goal: Flag every single-source F-35 supplier with foreign ownership over 20%.

input.rationale: Bluewater Components Corp is a sole-source Tier 1 F-35 supplier with 35% German (DE) foreign ownership — well above the 20% threshold. A 210-day lead time and risk score of 72 compound the supply-chain exposure from concentrated foreign ownership in a single-source program.

Monarch Avionics Corp is a sole-source Tier 2 F-35 supplier with 48% Japanese (JP) foreign ownership — more than double the 20% threshold. Its 180-day lead time and risk score of 65 confirm meaningful supply continuity risk arising from the high level of foreign control.

Meridian Forge LLC is a sole-source Tier 2 F-35 supplier with 61% Italian (IT) foreign ownership — the highest foreign ownership percentage in this cohort — and carries the highest risk score in the query (80). Its 240-day lead time, the longest of the group, makes any supply disruption especially damaging to the F-35 program.

Northstar Fabrication Corp is a sole-source Tier 1 F-35 supplier with 55% Italian (IT) foreign ownership, nearly three times the 20% threshold. Despite a shorter lead time (41 days), the majority foreign ownership of a single-source Tier 1 F-35 component supplier represents a significant program risk warranting a flag.

All are unreviewed, single-source, F-35 program, with foreign ownership >20%. I'll flag all four simultaneously now.All four suppliers have been flagged. Here's a summary:
